name: House Shirsh
summary: Magic-investigative house tied to the Magi Magistratus and celestial-mystical study.
motive: Keep magical misconduct legible and maintain Shirsh authority over sensitive arcane inquiry.
power_relations: Exercises magical oversight that can unsettle other houses
current_pressure: need to distinguish inquiry from dangerous misuse
visible_membership_base: Magistrates, celestial scholars, licensed investigators, archive specialists.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Their legitimacy depends on expert neutrality, which is hard to preserve when magical politics turn personal.
